_note: Plaid OAuth2 is for partners/services integrating with Plaid's platform, NOT for end-user bank connections (those use Plaid Link with /link/token/create). Token endpoint supports client_credentials, refresh_token, and token-exchange grant types. Sandbox base URL is https://sandbox.plaid.com, development is https://development.plaid.com. No standard authorization_endpoint; Plaid uses API keys (client_id + secret) rather than a browser-based authorization code flow for developer access.
